case_title: RAYMOND BRANN VS. KEITH KMET et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRANN, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT KMET, KEITH DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRANN, RAYMOND SERVED MAY-07-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KMET, KEITH

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KMET, KEITH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRANN, RAYMOND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KMET, KEITH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 7713 GEARY ST. #4, S.F. CA. 94121, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $19.72 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRANN, RAYMOND
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KMET, KEITH
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT KMET, KEITH

ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL JUN-26-2007
RENT DEPOSIT, RECEIPT NUMBER 031325, DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT KMET, KEITH
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT KMET, KEITH HEARING SET FOR JUL-25-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $139.44 FOR TRANSACTION W1907619R016 (RENT DEPOSIT), PAYABLE TO RAYMOND BRANN, DOC #1900623986, TRUST TAG #31325, WARRANT #38000880, DATED JUL-05-2007
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KMET, KEITH

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT KEITH KMET'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. KEITH KMET HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT KMET, KEITH

REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: THERE ARE NO FILINGS TO STRIKE. HOWEVER, DEFT, KEITH KMET DID NOT PAY ANY COURT FEES/COSTS. HOWEVER, ANY FUTURE FILINGS FOR COURT FEES AND COSTS ARE TO BE STRICKEN.
